name: IEvents
summary: Interface for the Events class allows the user to register event listeners for Drawings events. This interface allows the Marshaling of the Events class with Trimble.Remoting

methods.name: Register
methods.summary: Registers the instance to listen to the specified events.

methods.name: UnRegister
methods.summary: Unregisters the instance from listening to events.

events.name: DrawingChanged
events.summary: The DrawingChanged event is raised when the drawing has been changed and the database is committed.

events.name: DrawingDeleted
events.summary: The DrawingDeleted event is raised when a drawing has been deleted.

events.name: DrawingInserted
events.summary: The DrawingInserted event is raised when a drawing has been inserted.

events.name: DrawingReadyForIssuingChange
events.summary: The DrawingReadyForIssuingChange event is raised just after a drawing is marked or unmarked ready for issuing.

events.name: DrawingStatusChanged
events.summary: The DrawingStatusChanged event is raised when the drawing status has changed.

events.name: DrawingUpdated
events.summary: The DrawingUpdated event is raised when the drawing has been inserted, deleted or modified, and the database is committed.
